I AM AN AI GENERALIST FOCUSED ON UNDERSTANDING, USING, TEACHING, AND BUILDING WITH AI. MY GOAL IS TO HELP INDIVIDUALS AND BUSINESSES LEVERAGE AI WHILE BUILDING PRODUCTS, EDUCATIONAL EXPERIENCES, AND DIGITAL SOLUTIONS THROUGH BHAVY WEBSITE SOLUTIONS AND BG FAME.
